feed.title: The Git Times
feed.subtitle: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

entry.title: Superpowers Framework Turns AI Coding Agents into Methodical Engineers
entry.summary: “The information you have is not the information you want. The information you want is not the information you need.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: Attention Residuals Let Transformers Selectively Tap Deeper Layer Wisdom
entry.summary: “We live in a society exquisitely dependent on science and technology, in which hardly anyone knows anything about science and technology.” — Carl Sagan

entry.title: Lightpanda Delivers Zig-Built Headless Browser for Lightning-Fast AI Automation
entry.summary: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: GitHub Repo Exposes System Prompts Fueling Top AI Coding Agents
entry.summary: “Civilization advances by extending the number of important operations which we can perform without thinking about them.” — Alfred North Whitehead

entry.title: Reverse-Engineered APIs Unlock Neural Training on Apple Neural Engine
entry.summary: “Sometimes it is the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine.” — Alan Turing

entry.title: Claude Context Mode Compresses Tool Outputs to Salvage AI Context Windows
entry.summary: “Premature optimization is the root of all evil.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: CoPaw Launches as Self-Hosted AI Assistant for Developers
entry.summary: “Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.” — Arthur C. Clarke

entry.title: OpenClaw's memory-lancedb-pro Plugin Supercharges Agent Memory with Hybrid Retrieval
entry.summary: “Errors using inadequate data are much less than those using no data at all.” — Charles Babbage
